pi_items.source: setup_task.sh (line 9) and export_result.sh (line 5) - path is explicitly set and checked in scripts
setup_task.sh (line 31) - collection name created via SQL INSERT statement
Zotero Style Repository confirms this is an official citation style name; web search verified APA 7th edition is a real, published standard by the American Psychological Association

setup_task.sh (lines 41-56) - SQL INSERT statement adds exactly 5 papers with titles matching: '%Mathematical Theory of Communication%', '%Computing Machinery and Intelligence%', '%Attention Is All You Need%', 'Deep Learning', '%Deep Residual Learning%'
Web search: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948) published in Bell System Technical Journal by Claude Shannon; verified via Wikipedia, arXiv, and academic databases
Web search: 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (1950) published in Mind journal by Alan Turing; verified via Wikipedia, academic archives, and citation databases
Web search: 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017) presented at NIPS with Ashish Vaswani as first/equal contributor author; verified via arXiv, NeurIPS proceedings, and academic databases
Web search: 'Deep Learning' (2015) published in Nature with Yann LeCun, Yoshua Bengio, and Geoffrey Hinton as co-authors; verified via Nature journal, academic databases, and GitHub

pi_items.verified_value: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
pi_items.source: Web search: ResNet paper by He, Zhang, Ren, and Sun (2016) at CVPR has exact title 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition'; fragment verified via arXiv (1512.03385), OpenAccess CVPR, and IEEE Xplore

privileged_info_summary: The task exports a bibliography from a Zotero collection called 'Thesis Chapter 3' containing exactly 5 seminal academic papers: (1) Claude Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (1948), (2) Alan Turing's 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (1950), (3) Vaswani et al.'s 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), (4) LeCun, Bengio, and Hinton's 'Deep Learning' (2015), and (5) He, Zhang, Ren, and Sun's 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (2016). The bibliography is formatted using the American Psychological Association 7th edition citation style and saved as an HTML file to /home/ga/Documents/thesis_chapter3_references.html.
